tracks.meaning: of great weight; having much mass or density relative to volume
serious, significant, or consequential in nature or impact
characterized by force, impact, or intensity; hitting or striking with great force
of rain, snow, or precipitation: falling in large quantities; intense
rich in minerals, metals, or valuable elements; dense with mineral content
relating to an isotope of an element that is heavier than the most common form
denoting weapons, artillery, or equipment of large caliber or destructive capacity
of a chemical element: having a high atomic number or atomic weight
moving with difficulty; sluggish, labored, or slow in motion
rich, filling, or difficult to digest; not light or easily consumed
of music: loud, intense, or characterized by strong amplification and powerful rhythm
difficult to bear or endure; burdensome in emotional or mental terms
of a theatrical role: serious, dramatic, or requiring significant emotional depth
severe, harsh, or substantial in terms of punishment or consequence
of sleep: very deep and difficult to wake from; profound
characterized by a high volume of activity, demand, or usage; busy
computationally demanding or resource-intensive; requiring significant processing power
of soil: dense, clay-rich, or difficult to work; compact and firm
